name: American Electric Power
analysis: AEP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Price has broken above the base high at $138.4346. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $138.6900, stop $125.7102, target $177.6294 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
